## Type

- [ ] `feat` -- new feature
- [ ] `fix` -- bug fix
- [ ] `chore` -- deps, config, tooling
- [ ] `refactor` -- restructure without behaviour change
- [ ] `perf` -- performance improvement

---

## Checklist

- [ ] Opened `index.html` locally and tested the game works
- [ ] No console errors
- [ ] Works on both desktop (mouse) and mobile (touch)
